description: External partner CRM MCP server for contact search and lead creation.

transport.notes: External network endpoint. Must be routed through the SymbolOS egress gateway with allowlisted DNS and TLS policy.

auth.notes: Short-lived signed tokens issued by SymbolOS; partner must support key rotation and auditable access.

capabilities.summary: Search contacts (read) and create leads (write; confirmation required in clients).

rateLimits.notes: Stricter defaults for external partners; clients should back off and respect retry-after guidance.
